titleStmt.title: SII 26.429: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 429. (A.R. No. 408 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmāḍu puṇara puvimāḍu vaḷara, etc., and mentions the queen Mukkōkkiḻānaḍigaḷ.

It records a gift of land, by purchase, 500 kuḻi in extent, as dēvadāna to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, by Nīlisiṅgi, the wife of Malaiyamān Tirukkalaimarundu alias Āḻvānaṅgakkāṟa Malaiyamāṉ of Kiḷiyūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍit-Dāma-nāḍu. The gift was intended for various items of worship and offerings to the above-mentioned deity for the processions conducted on all Amāvāsī days, fifty two in number, in a year. The land was purchased from the mahāsabhai of Śiṟṟiṅgūr for a sum of 3 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu by the donor. The inscription gives a detailed list of articles offered at the worship and their equivalents in rice.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu virumpa tan Irupatu malar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol cenṟu ti
cai toṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki veyaṟn taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyakkaṭal malai Utaittu valaṅkollāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟi
mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum virasiṅṅāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvanacakkiravarttikaḷ śrī vikramacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu malāṭāṉa jaṉanāta
vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu brahmateyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavatevar koyil Āditāsa Ādicaṇḍeśvara tevarkku Ivvūr vaṭakaḻa
niyil koṉṟa mañci vaṭakkiṟ taṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu Ittevarku Amāvāsi Eḻuntaruḷukaikku tirumantirappoṉakattukku tiruvamutu Arici nāṉāḻiyum Eḻuntaruḷip pukuntāl Amutu
ceytaruḷat tiruvamutu Arici kuṟuṇiyum Āḷuṭaiyārkku Eṟupaṭi santi Onṟukku tiruvamutu Arici nāṉāḻiyum caṭṭicoṟu Aiñcukku Arici Aiynāḻiyum Āka Arici patakku Aiynāḻikku nellut tūṇip
patakku nāṉāḻi Uriyum kaṟiyamutu muppatiṉ palattukku nellu Aiññāḻiyum miḷakamutu Iruceviṭaraikkum Uppamutu Urikkum nellu nāṉāḻiyum neyyamutu Uḻakkukkum tayiramutu Irunāḻikkum ne
lluk kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu pattukkum Ilaiyamutu Irupatukkum nellu muṉṉāḻiyum tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai Aiññāḻikku nelluk kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka tiruplippapukavaṉ
marakkālāl nellu Irukalaṉe muṉnāḻi Āka Amāvāsi paṉniraṇṭukku nellu Irupattu nāṟkalaṉe tūṇi nāṉāḻikku tirumuṉaippāṭit tāmanāṭṭuk kiḷiyūr malaiyamān tirukkalaimarun
tāṉa Āḻvānaṅkakkāṟa malaiyamāṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ niliceṅki koṇṭu viṭṭa koṉṟa mañciyāṉa nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai Ittevar tevatāṉam tiruvalaku kuṇṭilukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkel
lai taṉmac ceykkum Ittevar Uyyapuṟak koṉṟa mañcikku teṟkum melpāṟkellai teṟkunokkippoṉa kaṇṇikkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ittevar tevatānam pariccāmiccey
kku teṟkum Ākavivvicainta nāṟperellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa Uḷnilam Oḻiviṉṟi patinaṟucāṇ kolāl kuḻi Aiññūṟum tevatāṉamāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttu Ivaḷ pāṭukoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkā
cu muṉṟu Ikkācu muṉṟum Aṟakkoṇṭu Ittanmañ cabrādityavat celvatāka Innilam viṟṟukkuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.429 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
